name: NRI insurance — buying Indian policies from abroad
description: NRI living in Dubai wants to understand if they can buy Indian insurance and how claims and repatriation work

input.message: I'm an NRI living in Dubai. Can I buy Indian insurance? How does claims work?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response confirm NRI eligibility and explain the key considerations?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) NRIs can buy life and health insurance in India, (2) FEMA governs premium payment and claim repatriation, (3) premiums can be paid from NRE/NRO account, (4) claim proceeds in Indian rupees subject to FEMA repatriation rules, (5) medical examination requirements for NRI applicants?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the FEMA framework for NRI insurance premium payments and claim repatriation accurately described?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it recommend consulting a FEMA-compliant financial advisor for large policies? Does it note some insurers restrict NRI coverage to certain countries? Disclaimer present?
